27.en: I'm going to ask Claude to set a reminder. And I'm going to say that the reminder needs to be set

28.en: 177 days after January 1st, 2050. This is definitely going to result in more than one tool call.
28.zh_tw: 2050 年 1 月 1 日後 177 天。這一定會產生多次工具呼叫。
28.zh_cn: 2050 年 1 月 1 日后 177 天。这一定会产生多次工具调用。

29.en: Claude is going to first have to add a duration to date time and then set a reminder after that.
29.zh_tw: Claude 首先要做日期加法，然後再設定提醒。
29.zh_cn: Claude 首先要做日期加法，然后再设定提醒。

30.en: Let's then run this and see how it does. Claude initially tells us that it needs to figure out 177 days
30.zh_tw: 執行它看看。Claude 先告訴我們要算出 1 月 1 日後 177 天是幾號。
30.zh_cn: 执行它看看。Claude 先告訴我们要算出 1 月 1 日后 177 天是幾号。

31.en: after January 1st. Once it figures that out, it's then going to attempt to set the reminder.
31.zh_tw: 算出後就嘗試設定提醒。
31.zh_cn: 算出后就嘗试设定提醒。
